mapper.select:
select * from jsh_approval_config where ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1'
and (tenant_id = #{tenantId} or tenant_id is null)
order by id asc

select * from jsh_approval_config where module_key = #{moduleKey} and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1'
and (tenant_id = #{tenantId} or tenant_id is null)
order by tenant_id desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_approval_config (module_key, module_name, bill_type, bill_sub_type, approver_role_id, approver_role_name, enabled, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{moduleKey}, #{moduleName}, #{billType}, #{billSubType}, #{approverRoleId}, #{approverRoleName}, #{enabled}, #{tenantId}, now(), now(), '0')
mapper.update: update jsh_approval_config set module_key = #{moduleKey}, module_name = #{moduleName}, bill_type = #{billType}, bill_sub_type = #{billSubType}, approver_role_id = #{approverRoleId}, approver_role_name = #{approverRoleName}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update jsh_approval_config set delete_flag = '1', update_time = now() where id = #{id}
and (tenant_id = #{tenantId} or tenant_id is null)
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_approval_config_step (module_key, step_no, approver_role_id, approver_role_name, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{moduleKey}, #{stepNo}, #{approverRoleId}, #{approverRoleName}, #{tenantId}, now(), now(), '0')
mapper.select:
select * from jsh_approval_config_step where module_key = #{moduleKey} and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1'
and (tenant_id = #{tenantId} or tenant_id is null)
order by step_no asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_approval_task (bill_table, bill_id, bill_no, bill_type, bill_sub_type, module_key, module_name, bill_amount, submitter_id, submitter_name, approver_role_id, approver_role_name, status, remark, current_step_no, total_step, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{billTable}, #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{billType}, #{billSubType}, #{moduleKey}, #{moduleName}, #{billAmount}, #{submitterId}, #{submitterName}, #{approverRoleId}, #{approverRoleName}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{currentStepNo}, #{totalStep}, #{tenantId}, now(), now(), '0')
mapper.update: update jsh_approval_task set status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark}, approve_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update jsh_approval_task set current_step_no = #{currentStepNo}, approver_role_id = #{approverRoleId}, approver_role_name = #{approverRoleName}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_approval_task_step (task_id, module_key, step_no, approver_role_id, approver_role_name, status, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{taskId}, #{moduleKey}, #{stepNo}, #{approverRoleId}, #{approverRoleName}, #{status}, #{tenantId}, now(), now(), '0')
mapper.update: update jsh_approval_task_step set status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark}, approve_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
